known_limitations: Requires sufficient controls; scipy optimizer sensitivity.
Less automated validation than CVXPY SCM variants.
Registry Bayesian mode on TBRRidge is not full BayesianTBR MCMC.
Pooled vs unit timing choices need expert review.
Limited stable recovery automation in CI.
Large config space; expert tuning required.

normal_tbr_where_runs: panel_exp.methods.tbr.TBR — ImpactAnalyzer + inference registry when panel has exactly 1 treated and 1 control series.
NOT in default_estimator_configs (TBRRidge is listed as 'TBR' label but factory is TBRRidge).
recovery_runner 'TBR' config incorrectly uses TBRRidge factory (audit finding).
Geo PowerAnalysis uses TBRRidge on aggregate two-row panel, not class TBR.

normal_tbr_geometry.aggregated_two_series: Required — 1 treated row + 1 control row (or single treated + single control column).
normal_tbr_geometry.multi_treated: Blocked at TBR class; use TBRRidge for multiple treated units.

normal_tbr_inference_wired: Declared in method_metadata: point_estimate, UnitJackKnife, JKP, Kfold.
Placebo explicitly excluded in inference/modes/impl.py for TBR class.
Live probe: unit-level multi-control panel fails asserts.
bayesian_tbr_where_runs: Uses ImpactAnalyzer.run_analysis → registry 'Bayesian' mode (NOT full NUTS path in registry handler).

bayesian_tbr_geometry.aggregate_control: Docstring notes aggregated or de-aggregated controls.
bayesian_tbr_geometry.multi_treated: Treated series can be multivariate; registry Bayesian uses quantiles on predict output.

explicit_answers.bayesian_tbr_uncertainty_object: Registry path: IntervalType.CREDIBLE_INTERVAL on path via JAX quantiles of predict() — NOT the same as estimator-native NUTS posterior from fit_model MCMC unless caller uses MCMC API directly.
explicit_answers.bayesian_tbr_production_status: research_only (method_metadata RESEARCH_ONLY; optional jax stack; INV-015)

augsynth_variants.AugSynth: Implemented; inference point_estimate/Kfold/Conformal per catalog; limited tests; UNVALIDATED.
augsynth_variants.AugSynthCVXPY: Implemented; requires cvxpy+osqp; point/Kfold/Conformal; Phase 14 OC.

explicit_answers.trop_status: research_only — TROP class in triply_robust_est.py; validation runner SKIPPED; tests/trop_test.py only.

oc_battery_roadmap.rationale: Phase 14 archive exists but no 001e-window D5 harness; base AugSynth unvalidated.
oc_battery_roadmap.blocked_by: cvxpy optional deps for CVXPY path

oc_battery_roadmap.rationale: Distinct from TBRRidge; aggregate-only asserts; geo product confusion risk.
Clarify registry Bayesian vs NUTS MCMC; multi-treated/aggregate geometry.
Active code but skipped in validation runner; research_only.
DEF-016 deferred; native bootstrap already documented; cumulative vs relative ATT policy closed.
oc_battery_roadmap.blocked_by: Policy closure DEF-003; low marginal governance value

oc_battery_roadmap.rationale: Remaining inference paths: UnitJackKnife, Conformal, TimeSeriesKfold, registry Bayesian on TBRRidge.
MMM readiness / gap audit — not a promotion gate until D5-INST-AUGSYNTH-001 and D5-INST-TBR-001 characterize core gaps.
oc_battery_roadmap.blocked_by: AugSynthCVXPY and normal TBR uncharacterized on 001e windows

findings.summary: TBR class requires aggregated 1×1 treated/control; TBRRidge is unit/multi-control path.
findings.implication: Geo PowerAnalysis uses TBRRidge+agg2, not TBR class.
Do not promote registry Bayesian as BayesianTBR evidence.

findings.summary: DID.run_analysis overrides registry; bootstrap is estimator-native cumulative ATT.
findings.implication: DID_Bootstrap Track B alias maps to native bootstrap, not registry mode.

findings.summary: recovery_runner TBR config uses TBRRidge factory.
findings.implication: Fix or document before any TBR OC battery.
